A.evidence: Good prose through section 3, but drops the first variance paragraph in 3.2; algorithms are partly tabular while Table 1/2 are merged and truncated, and some inline math is awkward.

B.evidence: Prose and most equations are strong, but Algorithm 1/2 are flattened into one heading line and visible CIFAR tables are absent in the shown start; minor math slips remain.

C.evidence: Prose mostly readable but author block/order is jumbled, many equations are replaced by formula-not-decoded, and Table 1/2 are badly merged with repeated/misplaced columns.

D.evidence: Large LOC token pollution and hallucinated equation-number run make reading order unusable; some math is present but corrupted, and tables are not structurally useful.

E.evidence: Clean prose and section order, but visible Table 1/2 are missing and several equations have wrong barred-alpha/subscript structure or broken Eq. 9/10 grouping.

F.evidence: Early prose is readable, but math collapses into glyph garbage and repeated symbols, Table 1/2 captions/rows are duplicated and unstructured, with duplicated Eq. 14.

G.evidence: Very faithful prose, hierarchy, and LaTeX; Algorithm table is structured and Table 1 begins correctly, with only minor formula issues such as Algorithm 2 using 1-alpha_t for beta_t.

H.evidence: Good prose and much usable math, but email/URL errors, duplicated Eq. 10 block, inserted JSON/bbox artifacts, and Algorithm table embedded as raw extraction data hurt structure.
